sentence: 这座城市有大量华人侨民聚居。
pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì yǒu dàliàng Huárén qiáomín jùjū.
english: This city has a large community of overseas Chinese residents.

sentence: 这所学校采用的是六年制小学学制。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xuéxiào cǎiyòng de shì liù nián zhì xiǎoxué xuézhì.
english: This school follows a six-year primary education system.

meaning: racing driver (in a car race); rider (in a motorcycle or bicycle race)
sentence: 这位车手在最后一圈超越了对手，夺得冠军。
pinyin: Zhè wèi chēshǒu zài zuìhòu yī quān chāoyuè le duìshǒu, duódé guànjūn.
english: This driver overtook his rival in the final lap to win the championship.

meaning: to serve as evidence for (an accusation etc); to reinforce (a percepti
sentence: 这份录音坐实了他撒谎的事实。
pinyin: Zhè fèn lùyīn zuòshí le tā sāhuǎng de shìshí.
english: This recording confirmed the fact that he lied.

sentence: 他因性侵未成年人被判入狱。
pinyin: Tā yīn xìngqīn wèichéngnián rén bèi pàn rùyù.
english: He was sentenced to prison for sexually assaulting a minor.
